info.title: IoT DC3 REST API
info.description:
IoT DC3 platform REST API documentation.

Covers all service modules: auth (authentication and authorization),
manager (device/driver/point/profile configuration), data (telemetry,
events, commands, notifications), and agentic (AI chat and tools).

Authentication: obtain a salt and token via /api/v3/auth/token/*, then
use the Authorize button to set X-Auth-Tenant, X-Auth-Login, and
X-Auth-Token. X-Auth-Token is a JSON object {"salt":"...","token":"..."}.

license.name: GNU Affero General Public License v3.0

RString.description: Unified API response wrapper. Every REST endpoint returns this envelope; the business payload is carried in 'data'.

code.description: Business response code. 'R200' on success, 'R500' on a generic failure; see SuccessCode and ErrorCode for the full set.

data.description: Business data payload; null for operations that return no body or on failure.

TopologyHiddenChildVO.description: An entity collapsed into an others bucket, retaining enough info to route on click

name.description: Display name of the collapsed entity

type.description: Entity type: driver, device or point (the profile layer is never collapsed)

TopologyLinkVO.description: One edge in the topology Sankey graph

source.description: Prefixed id of the source node

target.description: Prefixed id of the target node

value.description: Edge weight: relationship count in cardinality mode, or rolled-up sample count in volume mode

TopologyNodeVO.description: One node in the topology Sankey graph

id.description: Prefixed id (driver:{n}, device:{n}, profile:{n}, point:{n} or others:{layer}:{parentId})

name.description: Human-readable label; for others:* nodes it is "Others (N)" where N is the hidden child count

type.description: Node type: driver, device, profile, point or others

hiddenChildren.description: Entities collapsed into this node; populated only on others:* nodes

TopologyStatsVO.description: Tenant-wide total counts for the topology footer summary

driverCount.description: Total number of drivers for the tenant

deviceCount.description: Total number of devices for the tenant

profileCount.description: Total number of profiles for the tenant

pointCount.description: Total number of points for the tenant

rangeLabel.description: Short human-readable range label (e.g. 24h, 7d); present only in volume mode, null in cardinality mode

TopologyVO.description: Topology payload: a 4-column Sankey graph (Driver to Device to Profile to Point)

nodes.description: Sankey nodes across the driver, device, profile and point columns

stats.description: Tenant-wide total counts used for the footer summary

GrowthVO.description: Daily new-row counts per entity for the home page sparklines (zero-padded, oldest first)

RGrowthVO.description: Unified API response wrapper. Every REST endpoint returns this envelope; the business payload is carried in 'data'.

code.description: Business response code. 'R200' on success, 'R500' on a generic failure; see SuccessCode and ErrorCode for the full set.

data.description: Business data payload; null for operations that return no body or on failure.

BucketVO.description: Generic count bucket: a string key paired with a row count

key.description: Human-readable bucket key (status name, type name, or stringified entity id)

DriverStatsVO.description: Driver statistics rollup returned by the driver dashboard endpoint

total.description: Total number of drivers for the tenant

byEnable.description: Driver counts grouped by enable flag (bucket key is ENABLE or DISABLE)

byType.description: Driver counts grouped by driver type flag (bucket key is the driver type enum name)

byService.description: Driver counts grouped by service name (bucket key is the raw service name, e.g. dc3-driver-modbus-tcp)

RDriverStatsVO.description: Unified API response wrapper. Every REST endpoint returns this envelope; the business payload is carried in 'data'.

code.description: Business response code. 'R200' on success, 'R500' on a generic failure; see SuccessCode and ErrorCode for the full set.

data.description: Business data payload; null for operations that return no body or on failure.

DeviceStatsVO.description: Device statistics rollup returned by the device dashboard endpoint

total.description: Total number of devices for the tenant

byEnable.description: Device counts grouped by enable status

byDriver.description: Top-N device counts grouped by driver id (bucket key is the stringified driver id)

byProfile.description: Top-N profile binding counts grouped by profile id (bucket key is the stringified profile id); counts are bindings, not unique devices
